Articles

Algorithms

Electricity Standard Load Profiles (Standardlastprofile Strom)

BDEW Standardlastprofile Strom algorithm in R: period mapping, dynamization function, and public holiday handling for profiles H0, G0-G6, L0-L2, H25, G25, L25, P25, S25.

Gas Standard Load Profiles (Standardlastprofile Gas)

BDEW Standardlastprofile Gas in R: the SigLinDe synthetic procedure, Kundenwert, and weekday factors for 15 gas profiles (HEF, HMF, HKO, GKO, and 11 more).

Gas profile function and parameters

SigLinDe Parameters and Weekday Factors for Gas SLP

SigLinDe profile function coefficients (A, B, C, D, mH, bH, mW, bW) and weekday factors for all 15 BDEW Standardlastprofile Gas - variants 33 and 34, from the BDEW Leitfaden (as of 2026-03-27).
